footer.infos: A fast, local randomizer for searXNG instances and for !!external bang users

about.title: About
about.text: Searloc is a fast, local randomizer for searXNG instances and for !!external bang users.
about.legal_notice: This site is published on a personal, non-profit basis. It is hosted by IONOS, a German Internet Service Provider: IONOS SE, Elgendorfer Str. 57, 56410 Montabaur, Germany. Searloc is not affiliated with searXNG or IONOS.
about.privacy_text: Searloc does not collect any personal data. Search requests are processed locally in your browser and are not sent to a server. The instances/sites you access via Searloc may collect personal data. Please consult their respective privacy policies for more information. We use localStorage to store selected instances, settings, cache bangs and the last search for retry (opt-int), but no personal data is collected or shared. Our hosting provider, IONOS, may collect anonymous usage data in accordance with its privacy policy (https://www.ionos.fr/terms-gtc/terms-privacy/). By using Searloc, you agree to these terms.

settings.title: Settings
settings.custom_instance_desc: Add your own searXNG instances. Separate multiple entries with commas.
settings.export_error: Failed to export settings. Please try again.
settings.import_error: Failed to import settings. Please check the file format.
settings.import_invalid_file: Please select a valid JSON file.

search_engine_guide.title: How to add Searloc as search engine in

chrome.step1: Open Chrome and go to Settings (⋮ > Settings)
chrome.step2: Click on 'Search engine' in the left sidebar
chrome.step3: Click on 'Manage search engines and site search'
chrome.step5: Enter 'Searloc' as name, 'searloc' as shortcut, and this URL as search URL: {{baseUrl}}/?q=%s
chrome.step6: Click 'Add' to save the search engine
chrome.step7: Click the three dots next to 'Searloc' and select 'Make default' to set it as your default search engine

firefox.step3: Select 'Add a Keyword for this Search'
firefox.step4: Enter 'searloc' as keyword and 'Searloc' as name
firefox.step6: Click on 'Search' in the left sidebar
firefox.step7: In the 'Default Search Engine' dropdown, choose searloc

safari.step1: Safari doesn't support adding custom search engines directly
safari.step2: You can bookmark this page for quick access
safari.step3: Or use the address bar shortcut by typing the URL
safari.step4: Consider using Chrome or Firefox for better search engine integration
safari.step5: Alternatively, you can change your default search in Safari Preferences > Search, but only built-in options are available

edge.step1: Open Edge and go to Settings (⋯ > Settings)
edge.step3: Scroll down to 'Services' section and click 'Address bar and search'
edge.step5: Click 'Add' and enter 'Searloc' as name and this URL: {{baseUrl}}/?q=%s
edge.step6: Click 'Add' to save the search engine
edge.step7: Click the three dots next to 'Searloc' and select 'Make default' to set it as your default search engine

opera.step1: Open Opera and go to Settings (⋯ > Settings)
opera.step2: Click on 'Search engine' in the left sidebar
opera.step4: Click 'Add' and enter 'Searloc' as name, 'searloc' as keyword, and this URL: {{baseUrl}}/?q=%s
opera.step5: Click 'Add' to save the search engine
opera.step6: In the 'Default search engine' dropdown at the top, select 'Searloc' to make it your default

unknown.step1: Check your browser's settings for search engine management
unknown.step2: Add this URL as a search engine: {{baseUrl}}/?q=%s
